name: Conan Exiles
author: ops@refx.example
description: Open-world survival in the lands of Conan. SteamCMD-installed dedicated server (Windows build via Proton) with PvP/PvE and mod support.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — the steamcmd:debian/proton install image ships no
# `steamcmd` on PATH. Bootstrap SteamCMD and expose it on PATH so the egg's
# `steamcmd ...` calls resolve (otherwise the game server never downloads).
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server
steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 443030 validate +quit
# Seed Conan ServerSettings.ini name + admin password (MaxPlayers/Port are on startup).
mkdir -p /mnt/server/ConanSandbox/Saved/Config/WindowsServer
CINI=/mnt/server/ConanSandbox/Saved/Config/WindowsServer/ServerSettings.ini
if [ ! -f "$CINI" ]; then
  cat > "$CINI" <<EOF
[ServerSettings]
ServerName=${SERVER_NAME}
AdminPassword=${ADMIN_PASSWORD}
ServerPassword=
MaxNudity=2
PVPEnabled=True
EOF
fi
echo 'Conan Exiles install complete.'

variables.description: Name shown in the in-game server browser.
variables.defaultValue: A ReFx Hosting Conan Exiles Server

longDescription: Build, conquer and dominate the Exiled Lands with your clan on a dedicated Conan Exiles server.
